steps.name: bedrock-streaming
steps.summary: Added stream_with_cache() method with EventStream chunk accumulation, cache_control, rate limiting, and 5 unit tests

steps.name: per-finding-prompts
steps.summary: Added PER_FINDING_ASSESSMENT_PROMPT + SUMMARY_SYNTHESIS_PROMPT with cacheable system/user split, build_per_finding_prompts() and build_summary_prompts() builders, 6 tests

steps.name: parallel-pipeline
steps.summary: Replaced monolithic _ai_assess() with parallel per-finding ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=5) + summary synthesis using stream_with_cache(), per-finding static fallback, hybrid mode support, progress_callback, 7 tests

steps.name: dashboard-exporter
steps.summary: Added export_dashboard() pure function writing 5 dashboard JSON files (index, sp800-30, sar, poam, authorization) with lightweight index.json summary, 9 tests

steps.name: cli-wiring
steps.summary: Wired progress_callback (click.echo) + dashboard exporter + pipeline timing into risk_assess_cmd, updated step numbers to [N/8], 4 tests

steps.name: ci-s3-upload
steps.summary: Added S3 dashboard upload to security-gate.yml: AWS OIDC auth, timestamped runs (immutable cache) + latest (60s cache) + runs/index.json timeline, continue-on-error with graceful skip
